data.change_summary: Removed the last runless matching remnants from the codebase. (1) Changed unique_terminal_replay_match to match only by exact run_id — removed the None => candidate.started_at == requested_started_at fallback that allowed legacy runless entries to be matched by timestamp. Simplified the function signature by removing requested_started_at and _milestone_id parameters that were only needed for the removed runless path. (2) Removed dead run_id backfill code from backfill_terminal_entry (removed run_id parameter entirely) and backfill_running_entry (removed run_id.is_none() branch), since all matched entries now always have run_id set via exact-match filtering. (3) Removed dead run_id.get_or_insert_with in the non-terminal finalization path of update_task_run. (4) Removed stale runless comment from CompletionJournalDetails::merge. Combined with the round 20 attempt 1 changes already in the working tree (run_id and plan_hash made required in trait/service signatures, snapshot_plan_hash/safe_plan_hash_backfill/snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation removed, find_matching_running_task_run and matching_finalized_task_runs simplified to exact run_id matching, 31 runless/backfill tests removed), all 5 pending amendments are now addressed.

steps.description: Amendment 1+4: Removed runless terminal matching from unique_terminal_replay_match (fs.rs:2740) — changed from matching candidates by started_at when candidate.run_id is None to only matching by exact run_id. Simplified signature: removed requested_started_at and _milestone_id parameters. Updated the single call site at fs.rs:2992.

Amendment 1+4: Removed dead run_id backfill from backfill_terminal_entry (fs.rs:2643) — removed the run_id parameter and the entry.run_id.is_none() branch, since terminal entries found by unique_terminal_replay_match now always have a matching run_id. Updated call site at fs.rs:3084.

Amendment 1+4: Removed dead run_id backfill from backfill_running_entry (fs.rs:2676) — removed the entry.run_id.is_none() branch, since running entries found by find_matching_running_task_run always have a matching run_id.

Amendment 1+4: Removed dead run_id.get_or_insert_with in the non-terminal finalization path of update_task_run (fs.rs:3091), since the matched entry always has the correct run_id from exact-match filtering.

Amendment 1: Removed stale runless comment from CompletionJournalDetails::merge (fs.rs) — 'Named runs use run_id; runless retries are disambiguated by started_at' no longer applies since run_id is always required.

Amendment 2: Cross-adapter coupling already resolved — snapshot_plan_hash function was removed in round 20 attempt 1, eliminating FsTaskRunLineageStore's direct instantiation of FsMilestoneSnapshotStore.

Amendment 3: CorruptRecord misuse already resolved — the contract violation path (Some(run_id) without Some(started_at)) was eliminated by making run_id a required &str parameter and removing the started_at parameter from unique_terminal_replay_match.

Amendment 5: plan_hash already required in record_bead_start (&str, not Option<&str>) and all snapshot auto-population code (safe_plan_hash_backfill, snapshot_plan_hash, snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation) already removed in round 20 attempt 1.
Ran cargo test --lib (329 passed, 0 failed), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check (clean).

validation_evidence: cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
unique_terminal_replay_match now matches only by candidate.run_id.as_deref() == Some(requested_run_id) — no started_at fallback for runless entries
backfill_terminal_entry no longer accepts or uses run_id — entries found by terminal replay always have matching run_id
backfill_running_entry no longer has run_id.is_none() branch — entries found by find_matching_running_task_run always have matching run_id
grep confirms no 'runless' comments remain in unique_terminal_replay_match or update_task_run matching paths
grep confirms snapshot_plan_hash, safe_plan_hash_backfill, snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation have zero occurrences across all three files

Remaining run_id.is_none() checks are exclusively in data-handling functions: StartJournalDetails::merge (fs.rs:2303), CompletionJournalDetails::merge (fs.rs:2352), merge_attempt_entries (model.rs:315), legacy_group_accepts_completion (model.rs:569) — these handle reading/repairing legacy on-disk data, not routing new operations
TaskRunLineagePort trait: record_task_run_start takes run_id: &str and plan_hash: &str; update_task_run takes run_id: &str — all required at the port boundary
record_bead_start takes run_id: &str and plan_hash: &str; record_bead_completion takes run_id: &str — all required at the service boundary
